The Kingdom (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $47,467,250Details
International Box Office $39,335,207
Worldwide Box Office $86,802,457
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $34,837,038
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $980,569
Total $35,817,607
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,135,055 (36.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$72,500,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,793 opening theaters/2,836 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $82,515,748

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 28th, 2007 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: July 4th, 2025 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: December 26th, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for intense sequences of graphic brutal violence, and for language.

Languages: English
